name: read_files
description: Read multiple files from the knowledge base in a single call. Use this when you need to inspect a known set of files (up to 20) — it is significantly more efficient than calling `read_file` repeatedly. Each file must reside within a registered source directory and the current source scope. Supports the same file types as `read_file` (plain text plus extracted text from PDF/DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/images). Output is a JSON array with one entry per requested path; each entry is either {"path", "content", "totalLines", "truncated"} on success or {"path", "error"} on failure. Content is truncated at `max_lines_per_file` lines.

paths.description: List of file paths to read (absolute or relative to a source root). Maximum 20 paths per call.

max_lines_per_file.description: Maximum number of lines returned per file. Default 500.
